name: panda-conversation-editor
description: Visual conversation editor for P.A.N.D.A. interactive PDA conversations

scripts.build:catalogs: python ../build_editor_item_catalog.py && python ../build_editor_anomaly_catalog.py && python ../build_editor_story_npc_catalog.py && python ../build_editor_squad_catalog.py && python ../build_editor_task_catalog.py && python ../build_editor_info_portion_catalog.py && python ../build_editor_detector_tier_catalog.py
scripts.build: npm run validate:conversations && tsc && vite build
